flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Kalamazoo Valley Community College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (5.6k → 5.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Kalamazoo Valley Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Kalamazoo Valley Community College fell 14% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.2k → $9.7k).
